name: MetMuseum_search_objects
description: Search the Metropolitan Museum of Art (New York) collection for artworks and artifacts. Returns object IDs for artworks matching the query that can be retrieved with MetMuseum_get_object. The Met's collection has 400,000+ open-access artworks spanning 5,000 years of art history including paintings, sculptures, textiles, and decorative arts.

q.description: Search query. Examples: 'impressionism', 'ancient egypt', 'japanese armor', 'van gogh'

hasImages.description: Filter to only return objects with available images (true/false)

departmentId.description: Department ID filter. 1=American Decorative Arts, 3=Ancient Near East, 4=Arms and Armor, 5=Arts of Africa, 6=Asian Art, 7=Byzantine, 8=Costume Institute, 9=Drawings, 10=Egyptian Art, 11=European Paintings, 12=European Sculpture, 14=Greek and Roman, 15=Islamic Art, 16=Robert Lehman, 17=Libraries, 18=Medieval Art, 19=Musical Instruments, 20=Photographs, 21=Modern Art

isOnView.description: Filter to objects currently on view at the museum

artistOrCulture.description: If true, searches artist name and culture fields too

medium.description: Filter by medium/material. Examples: 'oil on canvas', 'marble', 'bronze', 'watercolor'

dateBegin.description: Start of date range (year, BCE as negative). Example: -3000 for 3000 BCE

isHighlight.description: Filter to only museum highlights (iconic objects)

isPublicDomain.description: Filter to public domain objects only (free to use)

data.description: Search results with total count and object IDs

objectIDs.description: List of object IDs (use MetMuseum_get_object to retrieve details)

name: MetMuseum_get_object
description: Get detailed information about a specific Metropolitan Museum of Art artwork or artifact by its object ID. Returns comprehensive metadata including title, artist, date, medium, dimensions, culture, period, dynasty, image URLs, and accession information. Use MetMuseum_search_objects to find object IDs first.

objectID.description: The Met object ID number (obtained from MetMuseum_search_objects). Example: 437422

isHighlight.description: Whether this is a museum highlight

isPublicDomain.description: Whether the image is in public domain

objectURL.description: URL to the museum's online page
